CustomField.description: Check For Non-CGP&H Lottery Number (Edison MTA)
CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000LLFu9", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000V5xlz", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000V61VE", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000V61aO", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000V61t6", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000V62Lv", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Woodmont_Station_at_Cranford__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000V62TE", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(Development_address__r.Id = "a0Jo000000V66Ed", TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c) <> "Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c"), "Lottery number should be Edison_Market_to_Affordable__c unless you have exhausted the wl for the listing stage.",
IF(AND(
Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000LLFu9", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V5xlz", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V61VE", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V61aO", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V61t6", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V62Lv", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V62TE", Development_address__r.Id <> "a0Jo000000V66Ed"
), "Good", "Good"
)))))))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For properties with non CGP&H lottery numbers, make sure to outreach as follows before moving to the next listing stage: 1. Non CGP&H Lottery Numbers 2. CGP&H Lottery Numbers 3. Interest Date
CustomField.label: Lottery Number Check 03
